seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rocky Gully and Roebuck. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Rocky Gully vs Roebuck: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rocky Gully and Roebuck.
heading: Rocky Gully vs Roebuck — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rocky Gully, Western Australia and Roebuck, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Roebuck has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Rocky Gully (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rocky Gully or Roebuck safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rocky Gully has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Roebuck scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rocky Gully scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Roebuck scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rocky Gully or Roebuck?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Roebuck has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
